# iconSize

**Instance Property**

Specifies the icon size.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var iconSize: Int { get set }
```

## Discussion

The icon is square, so only a single dimension is required.

## View Display Mode

- **mode**: Specifies the display mode of the camera device view.
- **hasDisplayModeIcon**: Returns whether the device view is being displayed in icon mode.
- **hasDisplayModeTable**: Returns whether the device view is being displayed in table mode.
